text: The Reserve Bank kept the policy rate unchanged in its latest review, citing inflation trends and global economic uncertainty.
The Reserve Bank of India kept the policy rate unchanged in its latest review, citing inflation trends and global economic uncertainty.
The health ministry published updated guidelines for seasonal flu prevention, including hand hygiene and early consultation for symptoms.
The city municipal corporation said garbage collection will continue on the revised schedule through the weekend.
A secret government memo says the moon has been sold to a private company and will be closed to tourists next month.

Scientists proved gravity is fake in a new study and announced that people can train themselves to float by breathing in a special rhythm for 10 minutes daily.
